insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great accomplishment starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also establish a foundation for building a consistent study routine. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can quickly turn your 0-session streak into a meaningful milestone, and with each subsequent session, you'll be able to track your growth and celebrate the improvements in your scores.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
